description_long: This object consists of two round, plump donuts placed side by side, each with a smooth, slightly domed surface and a subtle gradient of pink hues. The donuts have a glossy, almost translucent finish, with a lighter, shiny spot at the center of each, suggesting a soft, glazed coating. There are no visible holes in the center, making them resemble filled or mochi-style donuts. Small, faint markings on the surface add a touch of realism, possibly indicating slight imperfections or decorative touches. The overall appearance is soft and inviting, with a gentle sheen that enhances their appetizing look. The donuts are unadorned by toppings or packaging, and are presented as if resting on a flat, neutral surface.
description: A pair of glossy, pink, filled donuts with a smooth, shiny surface and no visible toppings or packaging. The donuts are side by side, appearing soft and appetizing.
description_view_0: Front view showing both donuts side by side, highlighting their round shape and glossy, pink surfaces.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the domed, shiny tops of the donuts and their close placement.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the roundness and subtle markings on the donuts' surfaces.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view displaying the underside of the donuts, with the same glossy finish and no visible holes.
attribute_icing_type: plain pink sugar glaze with a glossy finish
attribute_placement_location: resting on a flat, neutral surface
